precedents.name: Norway Government Pension Fund Global (GPFG)
precedents.governance: Norges Bank Investment Management (NBIM) under Ministry of Finance mandate
precedents.drawdown_rule: 4% real return rule — Storting may draw up to 4% of fund value per year for fiscal purposes
precedents.key_lesson: Long time horizon and strict rules-based drawdown prevent political capture. Oil revenue source is analogous to reparations income.
precedents.source_label: Norges Bank Investment Management — GPFG 25-year review 2023
precedents.analogy_to_trust: Primary precedent. 4% drawdown rule directly applicable to VidNova Trust endowment model.

precedents.name: Temasek Holdings
precedents.portfolio_split: Strategic equity in SOEs + global diversified equity
precedents.governance: Wholly owned by Singapore MoF; independent board; commercial mandate
precedents.drawdown_rule: No fixed drawdown — capital recycled; dividends to shareholder (MoF)
precedents.key_lesson: Strategic equity in nationally critical sectors generates superior returns if managed commercially. Transformation from SOE portfolio to global investor took 20 years.
precedents.analogy_to_trust: Strategic equity channel model. Ukraine has analogous SOE portfolio (Ukrhydroenergo, UZ, Energoatom) ripe for Temasek-style professional management.

precedents.name: Ireland Strategic Investment Fund (ISIF)
precedents.portfolio_split: Directed Irish economic development investments + global portfolio
precedents.governance: National Treasury Management Agency (NTMA); directed by Minister for Finance
precedents.drawdown_rule: Double bottom line: commercial return + Irish economic impact. 1.6× private co-investment ratio achieved.
precedents.key_lesson: Directed mandate (invest in Ireland) compatible with commercial returns if investment universe is large enough. Co-investment requirement is the key leverage mechanism.
precedents.analogy_to_trust: Closest structural precedent. Directed mandate (invest in Ukraine reconstruction) with private co-investment requirement — ISIF's 1.6× is the central leverage multiplier.

precedents.name: Marshall Plan — European Recovery Programme (ERP)
precedents.governance: Economic Cooperation Administration (ECA); country bilateral agreements; OEEC coordination
precedents.drawdown_rule: 4-year programme; grants delivered on project milestone basis; counterpart funds mechanism
precedents.key_lesson: Speed of deployment and political commitment were decisive. Counterpart funds (local currency matched by recipient) amplified multiplier effect. Infrastructure first, then private sector.
precedents.source_label: OEEC Marshall Plan implementation records; Eichengreen 'The European Economy Since 1945'
precedents.analogy_to_trust: $13 bn (1948) = ~$160 bn in 2024 dollars. Ukraine's reconstruction need ($486 bn) is 3× Marshall Plan at 2024 values. Speed and political will analogous, but institutional context is different.

precedents.name: EU Recovery and Resilience Facility (RRF)
precedents.portfolio_split: Grants 40% (€338 bn), loans 60% (€385 bn) — reform-conditioned disbursement
precedents.governance: European Commission; national recovery plans; Reform-milestone disbursement model
precedents.drawdown_rule: Disbursements linked to 527 quantitative milestones and targets across all 27 member states
precedents.key_lesson: Reform conditionality is a feature, not a bug — ensures disbursements drive governance improvement. EU RRF as predecessor to EU Ukraine Facility design is the direct template.
precedents.source_label: EU Regulation 2021/241 — Recovery and Resilience Facility; EC implementation reports 2021–2024
precedents.analogy_to_trust: EU RRF's conditional disbursement model is the template for the EU Ukraine Facility (€50 bn) and any successor programme. Reform milestones are the accountability mechanism.

precedents.name: VidNova Trust — Target at Maturity (Year 30)
precedents.portfolio_split: 20% grants, 30% concessional, 25% strategic equity, 15% availability payments, 10% endowment reserve
precedents.governance: Independent supervisory board; Ukrainian parliament oversight; G7 observer status; annual Norges Bank IM audit
precedents.drawdown_rule: 6% deployment rate during reconstruction phase (years 1–15); 4% endowment drawdown post-reconstruction (year 16+); corpus preserved in perpetuity
precedents.key_lesson: Modelled scenario — not a legal instrument. Figures derived from published precedent benchmarks. See methodology page.
precedents.source_label: uVidNova modelled scenario — sources: RDNA3, KSE, NORGES_BANK_IM, ISIF, TEMASEK
